item.title: Yash Savani
item.description:
Yash Savani

First year Ph.D. student advised by Zico Kolter)
Computer Science Department
Carnegie Mellon University
ysavani AT cs DOT cmu DOT edu

About Me

Hi! I am a research scientist, mathematician, and engineer with a passion for exploration and learning. The pervasive puzzles and patterns of our interconnected lives fascinate me, and I aspire to exercise my repertoire of math, computation, and collaboration skills to solve those puzzles with the highest positive societal impact. My current research interests include statistical learning theory, optimization theory, and deep learning.
